backend/main.mo: Main actor defining data types (Post, UserProfile, Message, TrackNoAlbum, Podcast) and public functions for social media features including posts, messages, music library, and podcast library with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old Track and Podcast types to new TrackNoAlbum and Podcast types by adding duration, description, and host fields with default values.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: music library page with TrackList component and podcasts page with expandable episode lists, linking files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components and pages including App.tsx with routing, Layout with navigation, authentication components, social feed pages, music/podcast pages, and various UI components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Lunita application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Home, Feed, Reels, Messages, Profile, Music, Podcasts, Admin), ThemeProvider, AudioPlayerProvider, MusicPlayer, and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying shield alert icon and message for unauthorized admin panel access with navigation button to home.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users to home, shows loading spinner during initialization, and displays ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Mobile bottom navigation bar with icons and labels for Home, Reels, Music, Chat, and Podcasts with active state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Chat view component displaying empty state with message icon when no conversation is selected, or message list placeholder when conversation is active.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays a list of comments for a post with author profiles and verification badges, and provides a form to add new comments with real-time submission.
frontend/src/components/ConversationList: Renders a messaging sidebar that displays an empty state placeholder when no conversations exist.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostForm.t: Form component for creating posts with caption and optional image upload, showing upload progress and handling submission via mutation hook.
Form for editing user profile including name, bio, and profile picture with file upload support and mutation-based save functionality.
frontend/src/components/EpisodeList.tsx: Displays a list of podcast episodes with play/pause controls integrated with the audio player context, showing duration and description for each episode.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header navigation, authentication-gated routes, admin access, theme toggle, and responsive bottom navigation for mobile.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx: Fixed bottom music player with playback controls, seek slider, volume control, and time display integrated with the audio player context.
Component for creating and displaying music playlists with a form input and list view showing playlist names and track counts.
frontend/src/components/PodcastCard.tsx: Displays a podcast card with title, host, episode count, and a collapsible episode list. Uses shadcn/ui Card components and manages expand/collapse state.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a social media post with author info, image, caption, like/comment buttons, and expandable comment section. Handles post likes and displays verification badges.
frontend/src/components/ProfileHeader.ts: Displays user profile header with avatar, name, verification badge, bio, and optional edit button. Opens a dialog for profile editing when user views their own profile.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time profile setup that prompts new users to enter their name and optional bio. Cannot be dismissed until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: Displays a vertical video reel with author info overlay at the bottom. Shows video player with controls and author avatar/name with verification badge.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes. Displays sun/moon icons with animated transitions.
frontend/src/components/TrackList.tsx: Renders a list of music tracks with play/pause buttons, album art, and duration. Integrates with AudioPlayerContext to manage playback state.
frontend/src/components/UserPostGrid.tsx: Displays user posts in a 3-column grid layout. Shows post images or gradient backgrounds with caption text for posts without images.
frontend/src/components/VerificationBadg: Simple component that displays an orange verification badge icon when the verified prop is true. Returns null if not verified.
frontend/src/contexts/AudioPlayerContext: React context provider for managing global audio player state including current track, play/pause status, and volume. Provides play, pause, and setVolume functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication. Handles both authenticated and anonymous actors, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, feed posts, music library, playlists, podcasts, messaging, and admin functions with mutation handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space, plus Google Fonts import for Outfit font family.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that checks caller admin status and displays access denied screen for non-admins, with placeholder for future admin features.
frontend/src/pages/Feed.tsx: Social feed page displaying posts with create post dialog, using PostCard components to render feed items fetched for the authenticated user.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero banner and feature cards showcasing platform capabilities (social, messaging, music, podcasts), redirecting authenticated users to feed.
frontend/src/pages/Messages.tsx: Messaging page with two-column layout showing conversation list and chat view, managing selected conversation state.
frontend/src/pages/Music.tsx: Music library page with tabbed interface for browsing tracks and managing playlists, displaying track count and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Podcasts.tsx: Podcasts page displaying grid of podcast cards with loading and error states, showing total podcast count in header.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page showing profile header and post grid, supporting both own profile and other users' profiles via URL parameter.
frontend/src/pages/Reels.tsx: Displays a feed of reels (short-form video content) filtered from posts by Section.reels, showing a loading spinner while fetching and rendering ReelCard components for each reel.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended theme properties including sidebar colors, custom border radius variables, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a social media app with Instagram-like features (posts, reels, chat), music streaming, podcasts, multi-auth support, and theme customization, excluding games from initial build.
